speaker: speaker1
text: We have another traditional holiday-the Dragon Boat Festival .

speaker: speaker1
text: It falls on the fifth day of the fifth lunar month .

speaker: speaker2
text: Could you tell me the origin of the two festivals ?

speaker: speaker1
text: OK . The Dragon Boat Festival is a way to commemorate a great ancient poet named Quyuan . On that day , people will hold a boat race as a symbol of the attempt to save him who threw himself into the river .

speaker: speaker2
text: Why do people eat rice cakes on that day ?

speaker: speaker1
text: In order to prevent the fish from eating the poet's body .
